data.title: Arthur Hayes Acquires 1.855 Million LDO Tokens
data.description: According to BlockBeats, monitoring data from lookonchain reveals that Arthur Hayes has recently purchased 1.855 million LDO tokens. The acquisition is valued at approximately $1.03 million.

data.title: Japan's tax reform is considering adopting a separate taxation system for virtual currencies, supporting the carry-forward of losses over three years.
data.description: On December 19th, Japan's Liberal Democratic Party and the Japan Innovation Party released a tax reform outline for fiscal year 2026. The outline proposes classifying virtual currencies as financial products that contribute to public asset accumulation and is considering applying a separate tax system to virtual currency income, similar to that for stocks and investment trusts. According to the outline, spot trading, derivatives trading, and ETFs of virtual currencies will be taxed separately, and losses from virtual currency trading can be carried forward for three years. Furthermore, financial products investing in virtual currencies are also included. Currently, the plan does not explicitly mention tax details for NFTs or reward-based transactions such as staking and lending. The outline also mentions that future earnings from virtual currencies may be subject to taxation when transferred overseas. (CoinPost)

data.title: BlackRock deposited $91.9 million in BTC and $22.41 million in ETH into Coinbase.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, BlackRock deposited 1,044 BTC (worth $91.9 million) and 7,557 ETH (worth $22.41 million) into Coinbase.

data.title: Russia’s Top Exchanges Set to Launch Regulated Crypto Trading by 2026
data.description:
Russia’s top exchanges, Moscow and St. Petersburg, are preparing to launch regulated cryptocurrency trading by mid-2026 under a new legal framework targeting highly qualified investors. The exchanges are building infrastructure and compliance measures, signaling a major shift in Russia’s financial landscape toward integrating digital assets responsibly and securely. The post Russia’s Top Exchanges Set to Launch Regulated Crypto Trading by 2026 first appeared on The Shib Daily
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/12/26/russias-top-exchanges-set-to-launch-regulated-crypto-trading-by-2026/

data.title: Former Alameda Research CEO Ellison Set for Early January Prison Release
data.description:
Former Alameda Research CEO Caroline Ellison is expected to be released from U. S. federal custody in January 2026, earlier than previously scheduled. Her case remains a defining moment for crypto enforcement and governance. The post Former Alameda Research CEO Ellison Set for Early January Prison Release first appeared on The Shib Daily.
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/12/26/former-alameda-research-ceo-ellison-set-for-early-january-prison-release/

data.title: Aave Founder Stani Kulechov Faces Backlash Over $10M Token Buy
data.description:
Aave founder Stani Kulechov faces criticism after a $10 million token purchase ahead of a key DAO vote. The move, coupled with a fast-tracked proposal to return control of brand assets to token holders, sparked debate over governance fairness, founder influence, and minority protections in decentralized finance. The post Aave Founder Stani Kulechov Faces Backlash Over $10M Token Buy first appeared on The Shib Daily.
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/12/26/aave-founder-stani-kulechov-faces-backlash-over-10m-token-buy/

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Trust Wallet: Improving refund process to ensure affected users receive refunds; 2. Eugene: Long positions in Bitcoin and some small-cap altcoins; 3. Stacy Muur: Non-trading fee revenue becomes a new moat for trading platforms; 4. Kalshi CEO: To host the first prediction market conference in March 2026; 5. Analyst: Q4 of this year was the worst quarter in crypto performance in history, and a sell-side strategy is currently suitable; 6. Matrixport: The crypto market may be shifting from a phase where downside risk is dominant to a phase where downside is limited and upside still needs catalysts; 7. Opinion: The strong rebound in BTC market share has caused altcoins to bleed; as long as BTC remains the "safest" asset, the altcoin season will not arrive; 8. ZachXBT: A scammer impersonated a victim of the Trust Wallet hack to lure users into interactions; 9. Meteora: DAMM V2 has launched a market capitalization-based transaction fee function; 10. Former Alameda CEO Caroline Ellison will be released approximately 10 months early; 11. Beware of scams impersonating "Hong Kong Exchanges" that lure you into depositing funds only to find you unable to withdraw; 12. Opinion: Grayscale's ETH holdings are more stable than BTC, with significantly lower selling pressure; 13. Data: HumidiFi SOL-USD spot trading volume has surpassed Binance and other CEXs in the past 3 weeks; 14. Coinbase's BTC price showed a negative premium of approximately -0.1% for one consecutive hour compared to several major Asian exchanges; 15. Trust Wallet hackers have transferred $4.25 million worth of stolen assets to CEXs; 16. Moody's: While a Fed rate cut next year is expected, patience is needed; 17. Solstice: The de-anchoring of USX on the Solana chain is a secondary market liquidity issue; the underlying asset net value and custodial assets are unaffected.

data.title: Bitget launches a new PoolX offering, unlocking 3 BTC from locked BTC.
data.description: Bitget has launched a new PoolX program, where locking up BTC unlocks 3 BTC, with a personal lockup limit of 50 BTC. The lockup period is from 18:00 on December 27, 2025 to 18:00 on January 2, 2026 (UTC+8). Users with a positive net BTC deposit during the event will receive a 5% BTC interest rate bonus coupon after PoolX ends. Additionally, first-time PoolX participants who meet the net deposit requirements will receive an extra 10% BTC interest rate bonus coupon. The net deposit deadline is 19:00 on January 1, 2026 (UTC+8).

data.title: Kazakhstan to allow crypto investments but ban payments
data.description:
Authorities in Kazakhstan are taking steps to legalize crypto investments, but intend to prohibit the use of digital assets in payments in the country. A new banking law will also fully regulate the establishment and operation of cryptocurrency exchanges, the activities of which will be overseen by the central bank in Astana. Kazakhstan is not […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kazakhstan-allow-crypto-but-ban-payments/

data.title: Aave's founder clarified that the $15 million investment in AAVE tokens was not for voting on proposals.
data.description: Aave founder Stani.eth stated in a post on the X platform that the DAO has generated $140 million in revenue this year, exceeding the total revenue of the past three years, and AAVE token holders have control over this fund. He will further clarify how Aave Labs' products create value for the DAO and AAVE token holders. Regarding the $15 million investment in AAVE tokens, he clarified that these tokens were not used to vote on recent proposals; this was never his intention, but rather a lifelong endeavor, using his own funds to support his beliefs. The recent DAO vote has concluded, raising important questions about the relationship between Aave Labs and AAVE token holders. This was a productive discussion, crucial for the long-term health of Aave. While the process was somewhat chaotic, debate and disagreement are inherent characteristics of decentralized governance.
